title: [Backend] Email-verified waitlist: migration 026, email validation, Gmail SMTP, API routes
[Frontend] Waitlist signup page + email verification landing page
[Frontend] Upgrade People page leaderboard with rich rank styling
description:
## HIGH — Merge rich leaderboard styling into People page

### What's wrong
The People page (`app/people/page.tsx`) has a basic leaderboard widget with emoji ranks, while the standalone leaderboard page (`app/leaderboard/page.tsx`) has better visual treatment — Crown/Medal Lucide icons, colored rank backgrounds (gold/silver/bronze), avatar color hashing, and larger display. The user wants the rich format inside People and to remove the standalone page entirely.

### What to build

Replace the `LeaderboardRow` and `LeaderboardSection` in `app/people/page.tsx` with the richer version from `app/leaderboard/page.tsx`.

#### 1. Add `RANK_STYLES` map and `getAvatarColor` helper

Port these from `app/leaderboard/page.tsx`:

```tsx
import { Crown, Medal, Trophy } from 'lucide-react';

const RANK_STYLES: Record<number, { icon: React.ReactNode; bg: string }> = {
  1: { icon: <Crown className="size-5 text-yellow-400 fill-yellow-400" />, bg: 'bg-yellow-500/10 border-yellow-500/30' },
  2: { icon: <Medal className="size-5 text-gray-300" />, bg: 'bg-gray-400/10 border-gray-400/30' },
  3: { icon: <Medal className="size-5 text-amber-600" />, bg: 'bg-amber-600/10 border-amber-600/30' },
};

function getAvatarColor(name: string): string {
  const colors = ['bg-blue-500','bg-green-500','bg-purple-500','bg-pink-500','bg-indigo-500','bg-teal-500','bg-orange-500','bg-red-500'];
  let hash = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < name.length; i++) hash = name.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);
  return colors[Math.abs(hash) % colors.length];
}
```

#### 2. Replace `LeaderboardRow` with rich version

- Crown icon for rank 1, Medal for ranks 2-3, `#N` text for 4+
- Colored backgrounds for top 3
- Color-hashed avatar initials (use `getAvatarColor`) instead of `bg-cq-primary`
- Keep `Link` wrapper for clickable rows
- Dish count: `text-lg font-black text-cq-text-primary` with "dishes" label

#### 3. Update `LeaderboardSection`

- Increase limit from 10 → 20
- Full-width tab toggle matching standalone page
- Only show Friends tab when `isAuthenticated`
- Tab labels: "This Week" and "Friends"
- Use `space-y-2` for row list instead of `divide-y`

### Subtasks
1. Add RANK_STYLES map and getAvatarColor helper
2. Replace LeaderboardRow with rich styled version
3. Update LeaderboardSection — increase limit, full-width tabs, auth-gated Friends tab
4. Update imports (add Crown, Medal)
5. Verify build passes

### Depends on
none

### Acceptance criteria
- Given People page, when leaderboard visible, then top 3 ranks show Crown/Medal icons with colored backgrounds
- Given rank 4+, then shows #N in muted text with default surface styling
- Given avatar without image, then shows color-hashed initial
- Given unauthenticated user, Friends tab is hidden
- Leaderboard shows 20 entries
- Build passes with no TypeScript errors

### Files to create/modify
- `app/people/page.tsx` (MODIFY)

title: [Frontend] Remove leaderboard nav item and redirect /leaderboard to /people
description: ## HIGH — Remove standalone leaderboard nav and page ### What's wrong With the leaderboard merged into the People page (task_213), the separate "Ranks" nav item and standalone `/leaderboard` page are redundant. ### What to build #### 1. Remove leaderboard nav item from `components/top-nav.tsx` Delete the entire leaderboard Link block (~lines 88-95): ```tsx Ranks ``` Also remove `Trophy` from the lucide-react import if no longer used. #### 2. Replace `app/leaderboard/page.tsx` with redirect ```tsx import { redirect } from 'next/navigation'; export default function LeaderboardPage() { redirect('/people'); } ``` This ensures bookmarked/shared `/leaderboard` URLs still work. ### Subtasks 1. Remove leaderboard Link block from top-nav.tsx 2. Remove unused Trophy import from top-nav if needed 3. Replace app/leaderboard/page.tsx with redirect to /people 4. Verify build passes ### Depends on none ### Acceptance criteria - Given top navigation, no "Ranks" / leaderboard link visible - Given /leaderboard URL, user is redirected to /people - No unused imports in top-nav.tsx - Build passes with no TypeScript errors ### Files to create/modify - `components/top-nav.tsx` (MODIFY) - `app/leaderboard/page.tsx` (REWRITE)
